title: No README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: run_dir has no README.md (ls README* -> no matches); _agent_stdout.log shows write_file was sandbox-blocked ('Refusing to write to sensitive system path') so the agent never produced it
suggestion: Add a README.md documenting go build / go run, PORT and DATABASE_PATH env vars, and the endpoint list

title: getBook compares against wrong error strings for not-found/no-table
evidence: app.go:116 checks err.Error() == "no rows in result set" but sql.ErrNoRows.Error() is 'sql: no rows in result set', so the branch is dead; not-found instead falls through to the correct 404 at app.go:121
suggestion: Compare with errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) and drop the brittle string match

title: Duplicate-ISBN 409 detection relies on substring match of 'UNIQUE'
evidence: app.go:74 strings.Contains(err.Error(), "UNIQUE") to map a DB constraint violation to 409; brittle against driver error-text changes
suggestion: Inspect the sqlite3.Error code (ErrConstraintUnique) instead of matching the message text

title: Duplicate-ISBN handling returns 409 Conflict beyond spec
evidence: app.go:74-76 and acceptance_test.go:490 TestAcceptance_DuplicateISBNReturnsConflict; TASK.md did not require ISBN uniqueness
suggestion: No action; noted as a positive enhancement over the spec
